
```{r}
library(rsample)
set.seed(1353)
car_split <- initial_split(mtcars)
car_split
train_data <- training(car_split)
test_data <- testing(car_split)
set.seed(9872)

car_split <- initial_validation_split(mtcars)
car_split
train_data <- training(car_split)
validation_data <- validation(car_split)
holdout_data <- testing(car_split)
```
